title: Pushing My AI Dark Factory to Its Limits with Opus + Kimi Combined
summary: Cole Medin demonstrates combining Claude Opus and Kimi K2.6 in an agentic codebase system by routing high-complexity reasoning steps to Opus while keeping fast implementation and validation tasks on Kimi. The goal is to scale token efficiency by allocating expensive reasoning capacity only to steps where it materially improves outcomes.
